appStore.title: Coloring Animal Zoo Touch To Color Activity Coloring Book For Kids and Family Free Preschool Starter Edition
appStore.description:
Top kids and family app on iTunes! Featured in 148 countries! The latest in our award winning kids app series! Celebrating 300,000+ downloads! A sincere thank you from Eggroll Games!

• Brand new panda bear coloring page just added!  Works on every iPod, iPhone and iPad!

All new and absolutely free! The newest installment in the Touch To Color series is smoother, faster, and adds fun surprises in a brand new setting! 

Interacting with every page is easier than ever; simply touch to color! But that’s just the beginning! 

Complete fun tasks at the zoo like popping bubbles in the aquarium, chasing the parrot in the aviary and helping cute little birds clean the hippo’s teeth! 

As you complete each page new things appear to color! Touch the barrel and monkeys pop out, touch each monkey to put silly hats on their heads! 

• Lots of colorful zoo scenes! 
• Discover hidden items to color! 
• Giraffes, elephants, hippos and more! 
• Cute hints help younger players! 
• Works on every iPod, iPhone & iPad! 
• No ads! No menus! 
• Created by parents and teachers! 
• Designed for kids of all ages! 
• Fun zoo setting! 

Eggroll Games builds interactive toys that promote learning and engage children through colorful interactivity without confusing buttons or menus. 

Like us on Facebook at facebook.com/eggrollgames, follow us on Twitter @eggrollgames or email us at color@eggrollgames.com! 

Our other apps! 

• Coloring Farm Touch To Color - Touch to color interactive pages and complete chores on the farm with goats, pigs, horses and cows! 

• Whose Toes Are Those? - The silly game show for kids where players identify animals by their toes! 

• Jungle Jam - A musical romp through the jungle with baby monkeys and a bamboo xylophone you can play!
